backend/main.mo: Defines user and driver profiles, payment method parsing, attachment upload, and access-controlled queries and updates using storage and authorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migrates old booking records to include a new declined_by field, transforming the stored Map into the updated structure.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to related frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each frontend file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining light/dark theme variables and base styling rules.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting PWA meta tags, icons, manifest, and mounting the React app.
frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA manifest defining app name, icons, colors, display mode, and metadata for installation.
frontend/public/sw.js: Minimal service worker implementing basic caching and network-first fetch handling.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the TanStack Router with all routes including driver dispatch and registers the PWA service worker with theme support.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays an access denied message with an alert and a login button for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/AuthRequiredScre: Shows a card prompting users to log in before accessing restricted pages.
frontend/src/components/forms/FieldError: Shows a small inline error message with an icon for form fields.
frontend/src/components/forms/StarRating: Implements an interactive 1–5 star rating input with hover, keyboard support, and optional clearing.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Provides a login/logout button using Internet Identity with state handling and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: Opens a dialog for authenticated users without a profile to enter and save their name.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Renders the site footer with branding, navigation links, and contact details including WhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Displays the main site header with navigation, contact info, admin/profile links, and mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/SiteLayout.tsx: Defines the overall page layout with header, footer, routed content, and profile setup dialog.
frontend/src/components/tracking/Schemat: Displays a schematic map showing a driver's normalized coordinates with marker animation and legend.
frontend/src/content/businessInfo.ts: Exports static business contact and service information.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidates related queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminGuard.ts: Checks if the current authenticated user is an admin using the backend actor and returns guard state.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttachments.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and upload user attachments using react-query, with cache invalidation on updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useCallerProfile.ts: Defines hooks to get and save the caller's user profile and a helper to extract a display name.
frontend/src/hooks/useDriverDispatch.ts: Contains hooks for fetching driver dispatch bookings and updating booking status with related cache invalidations.
frontend/src/hooks/useDriverLocationUpda: Provides a mutation hook to update a driver's location and invalidate related tracking queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity context/provider and hook for managing authentication state with AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Offers hooks for bookings CRUD operations including fetching, submitting, assigning drivers, and updating status.
frontend/src/hooks/useRateCard.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and update the rate card with react-query cache management.
frontend/src/hooks/useReferral.ts: Implements referral code generation, retrieval, bonus fetching, and applying codes using react-query.
frontend/src/hooks/useTracking.ts: Includes hooks to poll booking and driver location data for live tracking updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS base setup with custom light/dark theme variables and mobile-friendly layout adjustments.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point initializing React, QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and global styles.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Renders the About page with company story, values, and mission sections using styled UI components.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPa: Admin interface for viewing bookings, assigning drivers, updating statuses, and editing the rate card.
frontend/src/pages/BookCabPage.tsx: Cab booking form page handling user input, validation, profile-prefilled payment method, and booking submission with confirmation display.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Displays business contact details using card components, including phone, email, WhatsApp, service area, and hours.
frontend/src/pages/DomainSetupPage.tsx: Provides a multi-step guide for connecting a custom domain, including notices, registrar suggestions, and DNS setup steps.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDispatchPage.ts: Driver-only dashboard for viewing assigned bookings and updating their status with validation and action reasons.
frontend/src/pages/DriverLocationUpdateP: Allows an authenticated assigned driver to update their live location for a specific booking with validation and permission checks.
frontend/src/pages/FaqPage.tsx: Renders a FAQ page using an accordion with predefined questions and answers.
frontend/src/pages/FleetPage.tsx: Displays a list of vehicle types with features and details in a card grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Shows the homepage hero section, feature highlights, and navigation buttons.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Presents pricing ranges, factors, inclusions, and exclusions using cards and alerts.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Manages user profile data, referral codes, payment method selection, and file uploads with conditional UI for customers and drivers.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Renders a services listing page with a hero section and grid of service cards showing icons, descriptions, and features.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Displays a testimonials page with customer reviews in a grid, including ratings, text, and metadata.
frontend/src/pages/TrackingPage.tsx: Implements booking tracking with status badges, driver location polling, error handling, and a map view.
frontend/src/utils/paymentMethods.ts: Defines payment method options and provides a helper to get labels for PaymentMethod values.
frontend/src/utils/principalText.ts: Validates IC principal text input and returns parsed Principal or an error.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters with session storage support.
frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts: Builds WhatsApp enquiry URLs, normalizes numbers, and retrieves the business WhatsApp contact.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, typography, container queries, animations, and theme extensions for the frontend.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s state, existing features, and pending feature requests for an Android driver-dispatch app.
